data.body: SESSION PAUSE for context reset. 4/8 committed (a23963ca3 #4, 29d9fa863 #1, 068ba1842 #2, 23581b171 #5 tip); all in_progress, NOT closed (await Gerrit Verified). #6 desc fully remediated, round-6 stack-grounded review in flight (rp_codeimpact6.txt). #7 needs mechanism rewrite (bespoke detector seam) — recommend split. #8 infra+artifact (on-box canary un-verifiable). #3 last (deps #1/#6/#8). Handoff prompt written. REMEMBER: REBAR_GATE_REF=<stack tip> for stacked children's gates.
